author: barnabasbusa
content:
I’d like to officially propose sszing the engine api. No EIP, no fork/harsh deadline, just an optional ssz implementation so we can increase the EL <> CL communication by a factor of 2 at least. Open for discussion:
https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/764
